description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages try, build, deploy, test, and release using Docker runners tagged "docker". In the try stage add try_hchsfox, try_kc, try_kc_2, try_my_lab, and try_rock jobs, each using the ubuntu:16.04 image (or the custom Ubuntu image for try_my_lab) and executing respectively "echo \"hello word hchsfox1\"", "echo \"Hello, KC!!\"", "echo \"Hello, KC!!\"", "echo \"Hello Blues\" && pwd", and "echo \"Hello World\"". In the build stage add a build_binary job that uses the custom Ubuntu 16.04 image, runs "chmod 755 penguin-htdocs/DEBIAN" then "dpkg -b penguin-htdocs", and publishes the resulting penguin-htdocs.deb as an artifact that expires in one week. In the deploy stage add a deploy_to_dev job using the ansible:2.5.3 image, limited to master, develop, or tags on drx-tw/cdws-2.0-team-b, that runs "ls", "cd ansible-playbooks/", writes the VAULT_KEY to secret.txt, executes "ansible-playbook deploy.yml", removes secret.txt, and deploys to a staging environment at http://stg.cdws.drx.tw:32180. In the test stage add a test_dev job with the same image and ref limits that runs "cd ansible-playbooks/", writes VAULT_KEY, executes "ansible-playbook test.yml", removes secret.txt, and targets the same staging environment, and in the release stage add a release_to_prd job limited to master and tags that runs "cd ansible-playbooks/", writes VAULT_KEY, executes "ansible-playbook -i production deploy.yml", removes secret.txt, and deploys to a production environment at http://cdws.drx.tw:32280.
